allow:
Bash(git merge 001-ai-test-generation-cli --no-ff -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Merge 001-ai-test-generation-cli: AI Test Generation CLI

Phase 1 complete - AI-native test generation framework:
- CLI commands: init, validate, index, list, show, config, ai generate/update/analyze
- Core library: parsing, validation, models, indexing
- AI agent tools with GitHub Copilot SDK integration
- Multi-provider chain with fallback support
- 203 tests passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(.specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh "Refactor SPECTRA test generation to be conversational by default. When spectra ai generate is run without arguments, it enters interactive mode: lists available suites with existing test counts, asks what kind of tests, loads existing tests and shows coverage, identifies gaps and lets user pick which to fill, generates tests with summary, suggests additional uncovered areas. Same flow for spectra ai update. Flags still work for CI. Include bundled generation agent prompt." --json --short-name "interactive-generation")

Bash(python3 -c "
import sys
with open\(sys.argv[1], 'rb'\) as f:
    data = f.read\(\)
for term in [b'PermissionHandler', b'ApproveAll', b'UseLoggedInUser', b'OnPermissionRequest', b'CliPath']:
    idx = data.find\(term\)
    print\(f'{term.decode\(\)}: {\\"found at \\" + str\(idx\) if idx >= 0 else \\"NOT FOUND\\"}'\)" "$USERPROFILE/.nuget/packages/github.copilot.sdk/0.1.10/lib/net8.0/GitHub.Copilot.SDK.dll" 2>&1)
Bash(export PATH="$HOME/.dotnet/tools:$PATH" && spectra ai generate spectra-test-docs --no-interaction --count 3 2>&1)
Bash(cd /c/SourceCode/Spectra && sed -i 's/1.10.6/1.10.7/' src/Spectra.CLI/Spectra.CLI.csproj && dotnet build src/Spectra.CLI -c Release --no-incremental -p:NoWarn=CA1062 2>&1 | tail -3)
Bash(export PATH="$HOME/.dotnet/tools:$PATH" && cd /c/SourceCode/Spectra/test_app_documentation && spectra ai generate spectra-test-docs --no-interaction --count 5 2>&1)
